label: DeFi Pool Activity
description: AMM swap and LP-style activity table for DeFi venues showing pool, size, price impact, and fees.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file ✓.

1.1.note: Data from useMarketsData().orderFlowData and assetClass — no inline fetch ✓.

1.3.note: orderFlowData is market-wide — not per-org; appropriate for AMM market feed.

1.5.note: ownOrders in context filtered by scopeStrategyIds ✓.

1.6.note: Empty scope → all market AMM activity shown ✓.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file ✓.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ / batch ✓ (static mock feed) / paper ✓. Only active when assetClass=defi.

3.3.note: No order submission — AMM activity display widget only.

3.4.note: Human: confirm batch indicator visible in layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same read-only display as live.

3.6.note: useLiveFeed is memoized slice — no setInterval. Static mock feed.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A. Human needed for 3.4.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers — read-only AMM activity table ✓.

4.3.note: Human: verify time, pool, action, amount in/out, price impact, gas columns legible.

4.4.note: Human: set assetClass=defi in markets-controls → confirm AMM rows appear.

4.8.note: Human: verify horizontal scroll within widget bounds.

5.1.note: Target: DeFi AMM strategies (LP provision, AMM_LP_PROVISION). Shows swap/LP activity with price impact and gas. Only active when assetClass=defi. Uses orderFlowData as placeholder — real AMM feed wiring pending.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. Real AMM venue feed not yet wired. 5.2–5.6 require human walkthrough.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 not in scope for this pass.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget — useLiveFeed internally memoized ✓.

8.1.note: text-[10px] used in table cells (lines 36/47/72/73/75/79/80/81/82). HFT density pattern — no Tailwind token below text-xs. Deferred pending --text-hft-label token.

8.3.note: Uses LiveFeedWidget (shared), Badge, Card from components/ui/* ✓. Raw <table> for AMM activity — appropriate, no shared primitive covers this layout.

8.4.note:
No bare , no unlabelled , no
. Read-only table ✓.

8.5.note: Human: verify layout at minW=6, minH=3.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (text-[10px] HFT density). 8.2/8.3/8.4 pass. 8.5 pending human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Distinct from markets-live-book (classic order book) and markets-order-flow (all-market feed). DeFi AMM format is incompatible with the L2 order book structure.

relationships.notes: Driven by markets-controls (assetClass must be 'defi'). Shows empty state when assetClass != defi. Peer to order-flow and live-book.

dataContract.notes: Mock: reuses orderFlowData with type='trade' → Swap, else LP. Price impact (0.25%) and gas (35 gwei) hardcoded mock constants. Production: real AMM venue feed (Uniswap/Curve/etc.) — replace with useLiveBook/venue-feed when wired.

gaps: Price impact (0.25%) and gas (35 gwei) are hardcoded mock constants — replace with real AMM feed
Footer references useLiveBook — real venue feed wiring pending
Only active when assetClass=defi — no fallback data for other asset classes
coverage.notes: DeFi-only AMM activity feed. Not applicable to crypto/tradfi (shows empty state with redirect message).

knownIssues: Price impact (0.25%) and gas (35 gwei) are hardcoded constants — flagged for L4/L5 when real AMM feed is wired.
Footer note references useLiveBook — reminder that real venue feed wiring is pending.

findings.description: markets-defi-amm-widget.tsx — ~8 user-visible strings (Time, Pool, Action, Amount In, etc.)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.deferReason: No Tailwind scale token below text-xs (12px). HFT density pattern. Requests --text-hft-label token (10px).
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro across DeFi warning card copy, footer note, AMM pool/action badge, and all monospaced table cells (time, pool, amounts, price impact, gas).
